description: Official Replicate API schema for black-forest-labs/flux-2-flex

guidance.description: Guidance scale for generation. Controls how closely the output follows the prompt
guidance.title: Guidance

height.description: Height of the generated image. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32).
height.title: Height

input_images.description: List of input images for image-to-image generation. Maximum 10 images. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
input_images.title: Input Images

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality. Not relevant for .png outputs
output_quality.title: Output Quality

prompt_upsampling.description: Automatically modify the prompt for more creative generation
prompt_upsampling.title: Prompt Upsampling

safety_tolerance.description: Safety tolerance, 1 is most strict and 5 is most permissive
safety_tolerance.title: Safety Tolerance

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed

width.description: Width of the generated image. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32).
width.title: Width

title: flux-2-flex Input Schema
